name: SONO TEK CORP
summary: Sono-Tek Corporation designs and manufactures ultrasonic coating systems that apply precise, thin film coatings to surfaces for microelectronics/electronics, alternative energy, medical, industrial, and R&D markets. Products include Multi-Axis Coating Systems, Integrated Coating Systems, Fluxing Systems, OEM Systems, and the Universal Align subsystem. Founded in 1975 by Dr. Harvey Berger, inventor of the ultrasonic nozzle, the company uses high-frequency ultrasonic vibrations to atomize liquids into minute drops for environmentally-friendly, efficient surface coating applications.

products.name: Multi-Axis Coating Systems
products.description: Fully integrated ultrasonic coating solutions for complex surface coating applications.

products.name: Integrated Coating Systems
products.description: Complete integrated ultrasonic coating solutions for customer-specific requirements.

products.name: Fluxing Systems
products.description: Ultrasonic systems for applying uniform flux coatings to printed circuit boards.

products.name: OEM Systems
products.description: Ultrasonic coating systems designed for incorporation into original equipment manufacturer products.

products.name: Universal Align
products.description: Subsystem integrating ultrasonic nozzles and generators for customer OEM incorporation.
